Candidate 1
- Exposure: the brightness of the target image is 5-10% higher than the one of the source image.
- Contrast: the contrast of the target image is 5-10% higher than the one of the source image.
- Highlight: the highlight of the target image is 5-10% higher than the one of the source image.
- Shadow: the shadow of the target image is 5-10% lower than the one of the source image.
- Saturation: the saturation of the target image is 5-10% higher than the one of the source image.
- Temperature: N/A.
- Texture: the texture of the target image is 5-10% higher than the one of the source image.
- Overall: Go

Candidate 2

- Contrast: The contrast in the target images is heightened by 5-10% relative to the source image.
- Highlight: The highlights in the target images are enhanced, being 5-10% brighter than in the source image.
- Shadow: The shadows in the target images are deepened, appearing 5-10% darker than in the source image.
- Saturation: The saturation of the target images is increased by 5-10% compared to the source image.
- Temperature: N/A.
- Texture: The target images show a 5-10% increase in texture and sharpness compared to the source image.
- Overall: Go

- Texture: The target image presents a 5-10% increase in texture detail compared to the source image.
